subcodes.first_line: Although the darkness of oppression hath encompassed all regions, and the hand of tyranny hath been stretched forth against the oppressed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه ظلمت ظلم کل اشطار را احاطه نموده و دست تعدی ظالمان بر مظلومان دراز شده
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
